options.a: The highest speed at which sudden, full elevator deflection (nose-up) can be made WITHOUT exceeding the design limit load factor.
options.b: The maximum tested airspeed where the aircraft is free from any signs of dynamic pressure overload, flutter, and/or control reversal.
options.c: A speed selected by the designer and used to assess the strength requirements in cruise.
options.d: A specially recommended penetration speed for severe turbulence.
